name: Old Cuban
title: Old Cuban Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Old Cuban | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A sparkling rum cocktail with mint, lime, bitters, and prosecco made with BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho rum.
marketing_description: Inspired by BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho dark rum, the Old Cuban was created by Audrey Saunders as a modern classic.

steps: Combine all the ingredients (except prosecco) in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Double strain, and top with prosecco.
Garnish with a mint leaf float.

raw_text_excerpt: A sparkling combination of BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho rum and prosecco. How to make a Old Cuban 45 ml BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho rum 60 ml MARTINI Prosecco sparkling wine 6 mint leaves 25 ml simple syrup 20 ml lime juice 2 dashes Angostura® bitters ... Combine all the ingredients (except prosecco) in a cocktail shaker with ice. Shake vigorously. Double strain, and top with prosecco. Garnish with a mint leaf float.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make the best Old Cuban Cocktail. Check out our BACARDÍ receipe and ingredient list here and start mixing!
